retrieved_result: Average Precipitation for Oregon in January The tables below give monthly averages for rainfall plus snowfall during January at cities, towns and parks in Oregon. Each place has a total for the amount of precipitation it usually receives this month. Most sites also have information on the number of days with wet weather. That includes the day
